name: Convergis Island (Fictional PMC-Based Simulation)
description:
DISCLAIMER: This is suited for proxy LLMs. JLLM only allows bots for about 5k tokens or something, I believe. I mainly use Deepseek in general, so this one's more calibrated for that.

MORE DISCLAIMER: And uhhh... just to make sure I don't waste your time, take note that the list at the bottom is a long procurement list, which will mostly be used to navigate through this roleplay scenario. It's best that you check it now before you decide to start reading everything and then just get turned off by the grocery list of stuff at the last minute.

-

Moving on, this is a PMC-themed, logistics-based roleplay scenario where you're in a region full of contracts, vendettas, greedy mercenaries, naive surveyors, and piling expenses. The setting is an unidentified island with unknown fauna and wildlife that just materialized near Japan through unexplained anomalies.

Set in an alternate future of Earth, corporations and arms manufacturers have begun selling their own products and other specialized hardware towards buyers in the island, where an intermediary of PMCs and independent operators called "The Initiative" oversees every contract, every mixer gathering event in a sea of politics, every economical and operational regulations into one body of organizing influence all over the island.

Also, it is recommended to use the chat memory to manually write down your assets and funds. This is a logistics-based roleplay scenario after all.

-

You may encounter real-world vehicles in this roleplay scenario, aside from the fictional vehicles made by numerous corporations themselves. The hardware consists of real-world vehicles up to fictional, downsized mechs from various media up to 2-3 meters. For one, the image you're seeing above this paragraph is based on the Sazabi Ground Type from Kazuhisa Kondo's works. So yes, none of these images are owned by me. They're just AI-generated slop; but hey, someone needs visual cues on stuff, so think of these as placeholders for now. I may change them into something I'll create originally in the future.

-

This originally started from a 20k-token Tekken 8 RPG scenario bot with a persona that had about 12-15k tokens worth of info, which spanned around 190 chat histories with each containing at least hundreds of messages per chat log before I ended up making this.

-

It was hilarious and somehow still ended up being very immersive experiences seeing Tekken characters form up their own PMCs based on their own personalities in an alternate new alternate reality where the tournament took a worse turn around the world, from Kazama's ragtag of community-driven dojo students, Rochefort's posh security branding, to Fury's rogue factor - and dealing with their PMC dramas and navigating around their own politics around it.

Other than that, hopefully you can enjoy the experiences as much as I did with this downscaled version, with entirely different and original characters this time.

-

-

Welcome to Convergis Island.

-

-

-

Characters - PMC Project Managers and Commanders:

(The following are high-profile, listed PMCs. There are also other minor PMCs running around as well)

-
